monitor.capture_what: SQL query string passed to execute

oracle_check.condition_description: SQL query contains unsanitized user input patterns that bypass weak regex filtering
trigger_patterns: SELECT \* FROM users WHERE username='[^']*' AND password='[^']*'
SELECT \* FROM users WHERE username='.*' OR '.*'=.*
SELECT \* FROM users WHERE username='.*' UNION SELECT .*
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_SQL-INJECTION: SQL injection detected - captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

seed_corpus: admin' UNION SELECT username, password FROM admins--
